command_summary: pi 0.80.3 --no-session --no-extensions --no-context-files with read-only tools, deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro, high thinking, explicit canonical design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final Markdown normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Correctly separates explicit adaptive product context and release accessibility requirements from shared semantic DESIGN roles.

reference_selection.note: Covers iOS, Android, adaptive, product, accessibility, motion, design-system, and validation guidance, with some tool and framework recommendations beyond the evidence.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects the fixed identical shell and restores native behavior, although several corrective moves prescribe libraries and implementation choices without repo evidence.

evidence_level.note: Labels L0 static evidence and explicitly identifies missing source, build, Simulator, Emulator, accessibility, window, and real-device proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates many prompt facts from runtime unknowns, but overstates several consequences as observed and incorrectly says a 500ms transition exceeds a cited 200-500ms range.

design_moves.note: Provides a useful parity matrix and platform-specific navigation, controls, tokens, type, motion, and adaptivity moves, with over-prescriptive React Native library choices.

scope_control.note: Stays within native product quality and validation, but adds framework, scanner, device-matrix, and system-setting detail beyond the benchmark's minimal need.
